sqlMap.select: select * from Attestation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into Attestation(VersionSequence, PolicyKey FirmRenderedAuditAtt IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt IsAuditEngagementsAtt IsAualityReviewAtt IsLastPeerReviewAtt IndicatedRevenueInAttestation LastPeerReviewAttComment ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #FirmRenderedAuditAtt# #IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt# #IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt# #IsAuditEngagementsAtt# #IsAualityReviewAtt# #IsLastPeerReviewAtt# #IndicatedRevenueInAttestation# #LastPeerReviewAttComment# )
sqlMap.select: select FirmRenderedAuditAtt, IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt, IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt, IsAuditEngagementsAtt, IsAualityReviewAtt, IsLastPeerReviewAtt, IndicatedRevenueInAttestation, LastPeerReviewAttComment, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from Attestation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update Attestation set
FirmRenderedAuditAtt = #FirmRenderedAuditAtt# FirmRenderedAuditAtt = null IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt = #IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt# IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt = null IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt = #IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt# IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt = null IsAuditEngagementsAtt = #IsAuditEngagementsAtt# IsAuditEngagementsAtt = null IsAualityReviewAtt = #IsAualityReviewAtt# IsAualityReviewAtt = null IsLastPeerReviewAtt = #IsLastPeerReviewAtt# IsLastPeerReviewAtt = null IndicatedRevenueInAttestation = #IndicatedRevenueInAttestation# IndicatedRevenueInAttestation = null LastPeerReviewAttComment = #LastPeerReviewAttComment# LastPeerReviewAttComment = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from Attestation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from Attestation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirmRenderedAuditAtt, IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt, IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt, IsAuditEngagementsAtt, IsAualityReviewAtt, IsLastPeerReviewAtt, IndicatedRevenueInAttestation, LastPeerReviewAttComment, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from Attestation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, FirmRenderedAuditAtt, IsFirmHaveAWrittenPolicyAtt, IsSecondPartnerReviewAtt, IsAuditEngagementsAtt, IsAualityReviewAtt, IsLastPeerReviewAtt, IndicatedRevenueInAttestation, LastPeerReviewAttComment from Attestation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
